free_text: Mass 2 and 3 cluster structure study with quasi-free
reactions induced by 58 MeV protons on 9Be, 12C and
Institut de Physique Nucleaire (and IN2P3)
Institut des Sciences Nucleaires (IN2P3 and
USMG)
9Be, 1100 mu-g/cm2
14N, 2030 mu-g/cm2 (adenine)
An overall energy resolution of 400 keV for the
(p,p+d) reaction and 700 keV for (p,p+t) reaction has
been obtained. The absolute cross sections are
accurate to about 30% statistical uncertainties only
are included in the error bars of the distributions.
RIKEN Nuclear Data Group
On. Illegal unit codes and SF5 corrected.
Changed to lower case and 4-digit year.
EXP in SF9 deleted.
